allow:
Bash(powershell -Command "
\\$dll = 'D:/nvr/src/OvifViewer/bin/Debug/net9.0-windows/LibVLCSharp.dll'
\\$bytes = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllBytes\(\\$dll\)
\\$asm = [System.Reflection.Assembly]::Load\(\\$bytes\)
\\$t = \\$asm.GetTypes\(\) | Where-Object { \\$_.Name -eq 'MediaPlayer' }
\\$t.GetMembers\(\) | Where-Object { \\$_.Name -match 'olume|ute|udio' } | Select-Object Name, MemberType
" 2>&1)
